overall.description: A first-person walk along a scenic coastal highway in a video game environment, featuring tall pine trees, ocean views, and light vehicle traffic passing by on the asphalt road.

white delivery truck with METEORITE branding passes by on the road
red car passes by on the highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt shoulder of the coastal highway

notable_agents.action: white delivery truck driving along the highway

unpaved gravel and dirt area where the camera is walking

segments.scene_description: Walking along the dirt shoulder of a coastal highway on a clear summer day. Tall pine trees line both sides of the road while the ocean is visible ahead. Several vehicles including a dark sedan and a white delivery truck pass by on the asphalt road to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving coastal highway with rocky hillside

events.description: road begins curving to the right, ocean view shifts to the left side
white van drives past on the highway
dark SUV parked on the right shoulder comes into view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoulder as the road curves, approaching a parked vehicle

notable_agents.action: dark SUV parked on the dirt shoulder

entered.detail: compacted dirt and gravel shoulder transitioning to paved surface
rocky hillside and boulders on the right side of the road
dark colored SUV parked on the right shoulder

segments.scene_description: The highway begins curving to the right, revealing more of the rocky hillside on the right and shifting the ocean view to the left. The shoulder becomes more compacted as a white van passes by. A dark SUV is parked on the right shoulder near the tree line.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding coastal road with stone embankment

events.description: dark SUV drives past on the highway heading away from camera

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved shoulder as the road continues curving along the coastline

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the winding coastal road with the rocky terrain now forming a closer embankment on the right. The ocean is clearly visible on the left beyond the trees. A dark SUV passes by on the road. The parked vehicle is now behind as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway with continuous tree line

events.description: orange SUV drives past on the highway
dark pickup truck passes by on the road

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady pace along the shoulder with multiple vehicles passing

notable_agents.action: orange SUV driving along the coastal highway

segments.scene_description: The final stretch shows the road continuing along the scenic coastline with dense pine trees on both sides. Multiple vehicles including an orange SUV and a dark pickup truck pass by on the highway. The rocky embankment remains on the right while the ocean stays visible on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a coastal highway that transitions from a straight stretch of road into a winding path hugged by a rocky embankment. It begins on a dirt shoulder under a clear summer sky, moving past tall pine trees as a dark sedan and a white delivery truck pass by on the asphalt. As the highway curves to the right, the ocean view shifts to the left and the terrain opens up to reveal a rocky hillside and a dark SUV parked near the tree line. The scene then tightens as the road winds further, bringing the rocky embankment closer to the right while a dark SUV passes in the opposite direction. Finally, the camera continues along the scenic coastline through dense pines, passing an orange SUV and a dark pickup truck as the ocean remains visible to the left.
